findings.title: LaunchDaemon: com.apple.software.update.helper
findings.explanation: This LaunchDaemon starts automatically as root when macOS boots. The referenced executable is unsigned and located in a user-writable directory, which increases the risk that it could be abused for persistence. Risk factors: runs from or references a commonly abused writable/user-controlled path; target executable is unsigned or has an invalid signature; command invokes a scripting/downloader utility or remote URL.
findings.recommendation: Validate the plist owner, command, signature, and business purpose before considering removal.
